title: Tortured.jar (Dweller)
description: A entity who has escaped its containment in a haunted game console
body:
![Requires Geckolib ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/706112f8fba9440a4b4ec2e27d768650d0e58af0.png)


# 
![Torture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4012c5a76bc6e739b8b78a9c9c36c26d8e2d822.png)

Torture.jar is a entity that has escaped the confines of a haunted Sega Genisis (mod not affiliated with sega or nintendo) and now seeks revenge on the world of Minecraft, and will stop at nothing to **RIP YOU APART**
## 
![Behavior lmao](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9414e3749c5de61457c4cdbd9f0b0488672376f3.png)
Once loading up a world, torture.jar will surely but slowly make its presence known to you, it will make disturbing sounds and it WILL stalk you

once you have made eye contact with him, its too late for you, you will be the next soul he claims 
##
![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01139e7215f099a50669153d9308e7453d415380.png)

has a config file to configure how often he spawns and all the other stuff

more features coming soon ;)

##

IMPORTANT: if you ignored the big green text at the top NEEDS GECKOLIB FOR ANIMATIONS TO WORK
